episodes.title: FROM POLICY TO PEOPLE: MAYOR DAVID HOLT ON LEADERSHIP, YOUTH, AND OKLAHOMA CITY
episodes.summary: A conversation about civic leadership, long-term vision, the role of youth in shaping a city, and why productive pathways matter in Oklahoma City.

episodes.title: BE THE CONNECTOR: DERRICK SIER ON MENTORSHIP, COMMUNITY, AND POSITIVE ADULT INFLUENCE
episodes.summary: How one connection can change the trajectory of a life and why meaningful adult presence matters.
